token.ui:help: Generate a Storage API token from your Keboola project Settings > API Tokens

keboolaStack.ui:help: Select your Keboola stack. Choose 'Custom URL' for single-tenant or private deployments.

customConnectionUrl.ui:help: Only needed when 'Custom URL' is selected. e.g., connection.yourcompany.keboola.com

branchId.ui:help: Leave empty — you will be prompted to select a branch when connecting. Or enter a specific Branch ID manually.

workspaceId.ui:help: Leave empty — you will be prompted to select a workspace when connecting. Or enter a specific Workspace ID manually.
